gate_failures.message: Broad unsupported public claim language was detected and blocked.

uncertainty: Recall is bounded to indexed local pond/proof artifacts and may miss evidence outside the declared corpus.
Recalled reports remain evidence, not implementation capability.

audit_interpretation.effect_on_artifacts: The consult is recorded as a bounded Inside Voice audit. It does not replace public NASA/Rogers source lineage. Its broad-claim warning constrains the proof pack to evidence-backed causal reconstruction and blocks broader claims about system cognition or global capability.
audit_interpretation.required_public_boundary: Do not use this challenge result to claim AGI, consciousness, black-box solving, global truth recovery, or unsupported cognition capability.
